So I think outside of that, the way that I've really envisioned this, and I don't, I wish I had a good example to kind of like show, but the way I've envisioned it is just a, what we're trying, I guess what I'm trying to achieve here is a pretty niche, I guess, tunnel of content for people to come to who are looking for a certain type of banking.
So one example I would give you is we've been chasing the home services vertical, right?
Like that's something we've really been focused on.
So something that came up during one of these calls recently was that, you know, the way to really win with AEO and even somewhat SEO to a degree now is to be.
Willing to go into those niche topics and really deliver content around them.

So it just got me thinking, you know, if someone's spending that much time and they're in this like deep chat GPT hole of Googling and chat GPT and then Googling to around banking for construction or plumbing or whatever, how much of that could we actually fulfill if we like really pushed into it and like put money into it, put production into it.

And if the answer is that we could provide them with a really big volume of content that was actually valuable and relevant to the home services industry, so some of it would be like macro, you're running a home services business, here's the common traits of those businesses, lots of employees, like contractors, spending money on supplies, learning how to work with an accountant, hiring for seasonality, like all these things that are really common in that kind of sector.
But then also branch off into a few of the most popular
Like, what are a few problems that plumbers have?
What are a few problems construction has?
What are a few problems for roofers?
How much of that could we actually provide from a content standpoint?

Like, could we provide some quizzes?
Could we provide some calculators?
Could we provide some on-screen animation to help with wayfinding?
Could we make it something that's actually delightful?

I don't know that anybody's really done this with not only just like money management and business building in mind, but also just trying to respond to this new behavior of people looking for answers to these very niche questions.
I just, I don't know if anybody's really done it yet.

I think people do interactive little mini sites all the time, but I think the interesting thing is trying to surface things that you're looking for that you didn't, that you didn't know you could even find answers for all in one place and making sure that all of that also is optimized for AEO, as is everything we're doing right now, like all that new content.
I just want, I know.
We're just getting so many more AI referrals and we're getting so much more traffic from AI.
I just want them to have a place to land that's more engaging than just a blog.
